title: SEALED_WHISPER has no payload size check before offline enqueue
description: The SEALED_WHISPER handler validates recipient pub_id and subscription but never checks params.sealed.len(). A subscribed attacker can send up to MAX_WS_MESSAGE_BYTES (1 MiB) per sealed whisper. When the recipient is offline, the payload is persisted to offline_messages verbatim. The 1000-message queue cap limits row count but not per-row size; 1000 x 1 MiB = 1 GiB in the offline_messages table. WHISPER already has this gap (filed as nie-nbqp.8); SEALED_WHISPER shares the same code path without the fix.
